whitespace-nowrap"><button class="font-base-bold !text-xs rounded-l-lg bg-bg-000 h-full flex items-center justify-center px-2 border-y-0.5 border-l-0.5 border-border-200 hover:bg-bg-200 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:bg-bg-000"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><div class="relative w-4 h-4"><svg class="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-100 scale-0 opacity-0" fill="currentColor" height="16" viewbox="0 0 256 256" width="16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M232,128a104,104,0,0,1-208,0c0-41,23.81-78.36,60.66-95.27a8,8,0,0,1,6.68,14.54C60.15,61.59,40,93.27,40,128a88,88,0,0,0,176,0c0-34.73-20.15-66.41-51.34-80.73a8,8,0,0,1,6.68-14.54C208.19,49.64,232,87,232,128Z"></path></svg><svg class="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-100 scale-100 opacity-100" fill="currentColor" height="16" viewbox="0 0 256 256" width="16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M216,32H88a8,8,0,0,0-8,8V80H40a8,8,0,0,0-8,8V216a8,8,0,0,0,8,8H168a8,8,0,0,0,8-8V176h40a8,8,0,0,0,8-8V40A8,8,0,0,0,216,32ZM160,208H48V96H160Zm48-48H176V88a8,8,0,0,0-8-8H96V48H208Z"></path></svg><svg class="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-200 text-success-000 scale-0 opacity-0" fill="currentColor" height="16" viewbox="0 0 256 256" width="16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M232.49,80.49l-128,128a12,12,0,0,1-17,0l-56-56a12,12,0,1,1,17-17L96,183,215.51,63.51a12,12,0,0,1,17,17Z"></path></svg><svg class="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-200 text-danger-000 scale-0 opacity-0" fill="currentColor" height="16" viewbox="0 0 256 256" width="16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M168.49,104.49,145,128l23.52,23.51a12,12,0,0,1-17,17L128,145l-23.51,23.52a12,12,0,0,1-17-17L111,128,87.51,104.49a12,12,0,0,1,17-17L128,111l23.51-23.52a12,12,0,0,1,17,17ZM236,128A108,108,0,1,1,128,20,108.12,108.12,0,0,1,236,128Zm-24,0a84,84,0,1,0-84,84A84.09,84.09,0,0,0,212,128Z"></path></svg></div><span>Copy page</span></div></button><button aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="menu" class="bg-bg-000 flex items-center justify-center px-1 hover:bg-bg-200 rounded-r-lg border-0.5 border-border-200" data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_aanpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><div style="width:16px;height:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" height="20" style="flex-shrink:0" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></button></div></div><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Prompt caching optimizes your API usage by allowing resuming from specific prefixes in your prompts. This significantly reduces processing time and costs for repetitive tasks or prompts with consistent elements.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">This feature is eligible for <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/api-and-data-retention">Zero Data Retention (ZDR)</a>. When your organization has a ZDR arrangement, data sent through this feature is not stored after the API response is returned.</p></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">There are two ways to enable prompt caching:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold"><a class="inline-link" href="#automatic-caching">Automatic caching</a></strong>: Add a single <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> field at the top level of your request. The system automatically applies the cache breakpoint to the last cacheable block and moves it forward as conversations grow. Best for multi-turn conversations where the growing message history should be cached automatically.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold"><a class="inline-link" href="#explicit-cache-breakpoints">Explicit cache breakpoints</a></strong>: Place <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> directly on individual content blocks for fine-grained control over exactly what gets cached.</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The simplest way to start is with automatic caching:</p>
<div class="not-prose rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-border-300 border-0.5 my-6"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="flex gap-0.5 overflow-x-auto u-hidden-scrollbar py-1 -my-1"><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">cURL</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">CLI</button><button aria-current="true" class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors bg-bg-400 text-text-000 font-medium">Python</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">TypeScript</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">C#</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">Go</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">Java</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">PHP</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">Ruby</button></div><div group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:16px;font-weight:533.3'></span></span></button></div></div><div class="py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm h-full overflow-x-auto" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">client </span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> anthropic.Anthropic()</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">response </span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> client.messages.create(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    model</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"claude-opus-4-8"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    max_tokens</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">1024</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    cache_control</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">{</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"ephemeral"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">},</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    system</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"You are an AI assistant tasked with analyzing literary works. Your goal is to provide insightful commentary on themes, characters, and writing style."</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    messages</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">[</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">            "role"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"user"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">            "content"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"Analyze the major themes in 'Pride and Prejudice'."</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">print</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">(response.usage.model_dump_json())</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">With automatic caching, the system caches all content up to and including the last cacheable block. On subsequent requests with the same prefix, cached content is reused automatically.</p>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="how-prompt-caching-works"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>How prompt caching works</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">When you send a request with prompt caching enabled:</p>
<ol class="list-none pl-8 [counter-reset:item] [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:[counter-reset:item] mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">The system checks if a prompt prefix, up to a specified cache breakpoint, is already cached from a recent query.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">If found, it uses the cached version, reducing processing time and costs.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Otherwise, it processes the full prompt and caches the prefix once the response begins.</li>
</ol>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">This is especially useful for:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Prompts with many examples</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Large amounts of context or background information</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Repetitive tasks with consistent instructions</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Long multi-turn conversations</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">By default, the cache has a 5-minute lifetime. The cache is refreshed for no additional cost each time the cached content is used.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you find that 5 minutes is too short, Anthropic also offers a 1-hour cache duration <a class="inline-link" href="#pricing">at additional cost</a>.</p><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For more information, see <a class="inline-link" href="#1-hour-cache-duration">1-hour cache duration</a>.</p></div></div>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-border-200 bg-bg-200 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-text-000"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-text-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-text-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-text-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-text-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-text-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Prompt caching caches the full prefix</strong></p><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Prompt caching references the entire prompt - <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tools</code>, <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">system</code>, and <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages</code> (in that order) up to and including the block designated with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code>.</p></div></div>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="pricing"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Pricing</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Prompt caching introduces a new pricing structure. The table below shows the price per million tokens for each supported model:</p>
<div class="overflow-x-auto my-6 text-sm"><table class="w-full border-collapse"><thead class=""><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Model</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Base Input Tokens</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">5m Cache Writes</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left <div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The table above reflects the following pricing multipliers for prompt caching:</p><ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">5-minute cache write tokens are 1.25 times the base input tokens price</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">1-hour cache write tokens are 2 times the base input tokens price</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Cache read tokens are 0.1 times the base input tokens price</li>
</ul><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">These multipliers stack with other pricing modifiers such as the Batch API discount and data residency. See <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/pricing">pricing</a> for full details.</p></div></div>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="supported-models"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Supported models</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Prompt caching (both automatic and explicit) is supported on all <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/models/overview">active Claude models</a>.</p>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="automatic-caching"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Automatic caching</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Automatic caching is the simplest way to enable prompt caching. Instead of placing <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> on individual content blocks, add a single <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> field at the top level of your request body. The system automatically applies the cache breakpoint to the last cacheable block.</p>

How can I help with your ML work today?"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        {</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"role"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"user"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">, </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"content"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"What did I say I work on?"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">},</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">print</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">(response.usage.model_dump_json())</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="how-automatic-caching-works-in-multi-turn-conversations"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>How automatic caching works in multi-turn conversations</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">With automatic caching, the cache point moves forward automatically as conversations grow. Each new request caches everything up to the last cacheable block, and previous content is read from cache.</p>
<div class="overflow-x-auto my-6 text-sm"><table class="w-full border-collapse"><thead class=""><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Request</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Content</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Cache behavior</th></tr></thead><tbody class=""><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Request 1</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">System <br/> + User(1) + Asst(1) <br/> + <strong class="font-semibold">User(2)</strong> ◀ cache</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Everything written to cache</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Request 2</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">System <br/> + User(1) + Asst(1) <br/> + User(2) + Asst(2) <br/> + <strong class="font-semibold">User(3)</strong> ◀ cache</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">System through User(2) read from cache; <br/> Asst(2) + User(3) written to cache</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Request 3</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">System <br/> + User(1) + Asst(1) <br/> + User(2) + Asst(2) <br/> + User(3) + Asst(3) <br/> + <strong class="font-semibold">User(4)</strong> ◀ cache</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">System through User(3) read from cache; <br/> Asst(3) + User(4) written to cache</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The cache breakpoint automatically moves to the last cacheable block in each request, so you don't need to update any <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> markers as the conversation grows.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="ttl-support"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>TTL support</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">By default, automatic caching uses a 5-minute TTL. You can specify a 1-hour TTL at 2x the base input token price:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm code-block-scroll overflow-x-auto" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">{ </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"cache_control"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: { </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"ephemeral"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">, </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"ttl"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"1h"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> } }</span></span></code></pre></div></div><div class="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 bg-bg-100 rounded pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-1 transition-opacity duration-200 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100"><button aria-label="Copy code" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 text-text-500" data-cds="Button" data-size="sm" id="base-ui-_R_ti5manpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></span></button></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="combining-with-block-level-caching"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Combining with block-level caching</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Automatic caching is compatible with <a class="inline-link" href="#explicit-cache-breakpoints">explicit cache breakpoints</a>. When used together, the automatic cache breakpoint uses one of the 4 available breakpoint slots.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">This lets you combine both approaches. For example, use an explicit breakpoint to cache your system prompt, while automatic caching handles the conversation:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm code-block-scroll overflow-x-auto" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">{</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "model"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"claude-opus-4-8"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "max_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">1024</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "cache_control"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: { </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"ephemeral"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "system"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      "type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"text"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      "text"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"You are a helpful assistant."</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      "cache_control"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: { </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"ephemeral"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">  ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "messages"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: [{ </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"role"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"user"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">, </span><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">"content"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"What are the key terms?"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> }]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">}</span></span></code></pre></div></div><div class="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 bg-bg-100 rounded pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-1 transition-opacity duration-200 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100"><button aria-label="Copy code" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 text-text-500" data-cds="Button" data-size="sm" id="base-ui-_R_tidmanpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></span></button></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="what-stays-the-same"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>What stays the same</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Automatic caching uses the same underlying caching infrastructure. Pricing, minimum token thresholds, context ordering requirements, and the 20-block lookback window all apply the same as with explicit breakpoints.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="edge-cases"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Edge cases</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">If the last block already has an explicit <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> with the same TTL, automatic caching is a no-op.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">If the last block has an explicit <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> with a different TTL, the API returns a 400 error.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">If 4 explicit block-level breakpoints already exist, the API returns a 400 error (no slots left for automatic caching).</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">If the last block is not eligible as an automatic cache breakpoint target, the system silently walks backwards to find the nearest eligible block. If none is found, caching is skipped.</li>
</ul>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Automatic caching is available on the Claude API, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-platform-on-aws">Claude Platform on AWS</a>, and <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-microsoft-foundry">Microsoft Foundry</a> (beta). Bedrock and Vertex AI do not support automatic caching.</p></div></div>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="explicit-cache-breakpoints"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Explicit cache breakpoints</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For more control over caching, you can place <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> directly on individual content blocks. This is useful when you need to cache different sections that change at different frequencies, or need fine-grained control over exactly what gets cached.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="structuring-your-prompt"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Structuring your prompt</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Place static content (tool definitions, system instructions, context, examples) at the beginning of your prompt. Mark the end of the reusable content for caching using the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> parameter.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Cache prefixes are created in the following order: <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tools</code>, <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">system</code>, then <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages</code>. This order forms a hierarchy where each level builds upon the previous ones.</p>
<h4 class="text-lg font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="how-automatic-prefix-checking-works"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.05em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>How automatic prefix checking works</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h4>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">You can use just one cache breakpoint at the end of your static content, and the system will automatically find the longest prefix that a prior request already wrote to the cache. Understanding how this works helps you optimize your caching strategy.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Three core principles:</strong></p>
<ol class="list-none pl-8 [counter-reset:item] [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:[counter-reset:item] mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Cache writes happen only at your breakpoint.</strong> Marking a block with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> writes exactly one cache entry: a hash of the prefix ending at that block. The system does not write entries for any earlier position. Because the hash is cumulative, covering everything up to and including the breakpoint, changing any block at or before the breakpoint produces a different hash on the next request.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Cache reads look backward for entries that prior requests wrote.</strong> On each request the system computes the prefix hash at your breakpoint and checks for a matching cache entry. If none exists, it walks backward one block at a time, checking whether the prefix hash at each earlier position matches something already in the cache. It is looking for prior writes, not for stable content.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">The lookback window is 20 blocks.</strong> The system checks at most 20 positions per breakpoint, counting the breakpoint itself as the first. If the system finds no matching entry in that window, checking stops (or resumes from the next explicit breakpoint, if any).</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Example: Lookback in a growing conversation</strong></p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">You append new blocks each turn and set <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> on the final block of each request:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Turn 1:</strong> 10 blocks, breakpoint on block 10. No prior cache entries exist. The system writes an entry at block 10.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Turn 2:</strong> 15 blocks, breakpoint on block 15. Block 15 has no entry, so the system walks back to block 10 and finds the turn-1 entry. Cache hit at block 10; the system processes only blocks 11 through 15 fresh and writes a new entry at block 15.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Turn 3:</strong> 35 blocks, breakpoint on block 35. The system checks 20 positions (blocks 35 through 16) and finds nothing. The turn-2 entry at block 15 is one position outside the window, so there is no cache hit. Adding a second breakpoint at block 15 starts a second lookback window there, which finds the turn-2 entry.</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Common mistake: Breakpoint on content that changes every request</strong></p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Your prompt has a large static system context (blocks 1 through 5) followed by a per-request block containing a timestamp and the user message (block 6). You set <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> on block 6:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Request 1:</strong> Cache write at block 6. The hash includes the timestamp.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Request 2:</strong> The timestamp differs, so the prefix hash at block 6 differs. The lookback walks through blocks 5, 4, 3, 2, and 1, but the system never wrote an entry at any of those positions. No cache hit. You pay for a fresh cache write on every request and never get a read.</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The lookback does not find stable content behind your breakpoint and cache it. It finds entries that prior requests already wrote, and writes happen only at breakpoints. Move <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> to block 5, the last block that stays the same across requests, and every subsequent request reads the cached prefix. <a class="inline-link" href="#automatic-caching">Automatic caching</a> hits the same trap: it places the breakpoint on the last cacheable block, which in this structure is the one that changes every request, so use an explicit breakpoint on block 5 instead.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Key takeaway:</strong> Place <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> on the last block whose prefix is identical across the requests you want to share a cache. In a growing conversation the final block works as long as each turn adds fewer than 20 blocks: earlier content never changes, so the next request's lookback finds the prior write. For a prompt with a varying suffix (timestamps, per-request context, the incoming message), place the breakpoint at the end of the static prefix, not on the varying block.</p>
<h4 class="text-lg font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="when-to-use-multiple-breakpoints"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.05em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>When to use multiple breakpoints</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h4>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">You can define up to 4 cache breakpoints if you want to:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Cache different sections that change at different frequencies (for example, tools rarely change, but context updates daily)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Have more control over exactly what gets cached</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Ensure a cache hit when a growing conversation pushes your breakpoint 20 or more blocks past the last cache write</li>
</ul>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Important limitation:</strong> The lookback can only find entries that earlier requests already wrote. If a growing conversation pushes your breakpoint 20 or more blocks past the last write, the lookback window misses it. Add a second breakpoint closer to that position from the start so a write accumulates there before you need it.</p></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="understanding-cache-breakpoint-costs"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Understanding cache breakpoint costs</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Cache breakpoints themselves don't add any cost.</strong> You are only charged for:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Cache writes</strong>: When new content is written to the cache (25% more than base input tokens for 5-minute TTL)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Cache reads</strong>: When cached content is used (10% of base input token price)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Regular input tokens</strong>: For any uncached content</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Adding more <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> breakpoints doesn't increase your costs - you still pay the same amount based on what content is actually cached and read. The breakpoints simply give you control over what sections can be cached independently.</p>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="caching-strategies-and-considerations"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Caching strategies and considerations</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="cache-limitations"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Cache limitations</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">On the Claude API, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-platform-on-aws">Claude Platform on AWS</a>, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-on-vertex-ai">Vertex AI</a>, and <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-microsoft-foundry">Microsoft Foundry</a> (beta), the minimum cacheable prompt length is:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">512 tokens for Claude Fable 5 and <a class="inline-link" href="https://anthropic.com/glasswing" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Claude Mythos 5</a></li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">2,048 tokens for <a class="inline-link" href="https://anthropic.com/glasswing" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Claude Mythos Preview</a> and Claude Opus 4.7</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">4,096 tokens for Claude Opus 4.6 and Claude Opus 4.5</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">1,024 tokens for Claude Opus 4.8, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Claude Opus 4.1 (<a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations">deprecated</a>), Claude Opus 4 (<a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations">deprecated</a>), and Claude Sonnet 4 (<a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations">deprecated</a>)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">4,096 tokens for Claude Haiku 4.5</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">2,048 tokens for Claude Haiku 3.5 (<a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations">retired, except on Vertex AI</a>)</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Model availability varies by platform, and so can the minimum for newly released models: on <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-amazon-bedrock">Amazon Bedrock</a>, the minimum cacheable prompt length for Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 is 1,024 tokens.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Shorter prompts cannot be cached, even if marked with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code>. Any requests to cache fewer than this number of tokens will be processed without caching, and no error is returned. To verify whether a prompt was cached, check the response usage <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-caching#tracking-cache-performance">fields</a>: if both <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_creation_input_tokens</code> and <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_read_input_tokens</code> are 0, the prompt was not cached (likely because it did not meet the minimum length requirement).</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If your prompt falls just short of the minimum for your model and platform, expanding the cached content to reach the threshold is often worthwhile. Cache reads cost significantly less than uncached input tokens, so reaching the minimum can reduce costs for frequently reused prompts.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-amazon-bedrock">Bedrock</a> is an AWS-operated platform. On Bedrock, see the <a class="inline-link" href="https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/prompt-caching.html" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Bedrock prompt caching documentation</a> for the per-model minimums, failure behavior, and usage-field names that apply.</p></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For concurrent requests, note that a cache entry only becomes available after the first response begins. If you need cache hits for parallel requests, wait for the first response before sending subsequent requests.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Currently, "ephemeral" is the only supported cache type, which by default has a 5-minute lifetime.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="what-can-be-cached"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>What can be cached</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Most blocks in the request can be cached. This includes:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Tools: Tool definitions in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tools</code> array</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">System messages: Content blocks in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">system</code> array</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Text messages: Content blocks in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages.content</code> array, for both user and assistant turns</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Images &amp; Documents: Content blocks in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages.content</code> array, in user turns</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Tool use and tool results: Content blocks in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages.content</code> array, in both user and assistant turns</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Each of these elements can be cached, either automatically or by marking them with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code>.</p>
