<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="what-cannot-be-cached"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>What cannot be cached</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">While most request blocks can be cached, there are some exceptions:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Thinking blocks cannot be cached directly with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code>. However, thinking blocks CAN be cached alongside other content when they appear in previous assistant turns. When cached this way, they DO count as input tokens when read from cache.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Sub-content blocks (like <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/citations">citations</a>) themselves cannot be cached directly. Instead, cache the top-level block.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">In the case of citations, the top-level document content blocks that serve as the source material for citations can be cached. This allows you to use prompt caching with citations effectively by caching the documents that citations will reference.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Empty text blocks cannot be cached.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="what-invalidates-the-cache"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>What invalidates the cache</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Modifications to cached content can invalidate some or all of the cache.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">As described in <a class="inline-link" href="#structuring-your-prompt">Structuring your prompt</a>, the cache follows the hierarchy: <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tools</code> → <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">system</code> → <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages</code>. Changes at each level invalidate that level and all subsequent levels.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The following table shows which parts of the cache are invalidated by different types of changes. ✘ indicates that the cache is invalidated, while ✓ indicates that the cache remains valid.</p>
<div class="overflow-x-auto my-6 text-sm"><table class="w-full border-collapse"><thead class=""><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">What changes</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Tools cache</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">System cache</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Messages cache</th><th class="p-2 pt-0 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-left font-semibold text-text-100 border-b-0.5 border-border-400">Impact</th></tr></thead><tbody class=""><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Tool definitions</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Modifying tool definitions (names, descriptions, parameters) invalidates the entire cache</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Web search toggle</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Enabling/disabling web search modifies the system prompt</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Citations toggle</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Enabling/disabling citations modifies the system prompt</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Speed setting</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Switching between <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/fast-mode"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">speed: "fast"</code> and standard speed</a> invalidates system and message caches</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Tool choice</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Changes to <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tool_choice</code> parameter only affect message blocks</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Images</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Adding/removing images anywhere in the prompt affects message blocks</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Thinking parameters</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✘</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Changes to extended thinking settings (enable/disable, budget) affect message blocks</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Non-tool results passed to extended thinking requests</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">✓</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Model-specific</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">On Opus 4.5+ and Sonnet 4.6+, thinking blocks are preserved by default, so the cache remains valid (✓). On earlier Opus/Sonnet models and all Haiku models, all previously-cached thinking blocks are stripped from context, and any messages that follow those thinking blocks are removed from the cache (✘). For more details, see <a class="inline-link" href="#caching-with-thinking-blocks">Caching with thinking blocks</a>.</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">On Claude Opus 4.8, you can add a new system instruction partway through a conversation without invalidating the system or message caches. Append a <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">{"role": "system"}</code> message to <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">messages</code> instead of editing the top-level <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">system</code> field, so the cached prefix stays unchanged. See <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/mid-conversation-system-messages">Mid-conversation system messages</a>.</p></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="tracking-cache-performance"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Tracking cache performance</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Monitor cache performance using these API response fields, within <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">usage</code> in the response (or <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">message_start</code> event if <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/streaming">streaming</a>):</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_creation_input_tokens</code>: Number of tokens written to the cache when creating a new entry.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_read_input_tokens</code>: Number of tokens retrieved from the cache for this request.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">input_tokens</code>: Number of input tokens which were not read from or used to create a cache (that is, tokens after the last cache breakpoint).</li>
</ul>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Understanding the token breakdown</strong></p><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">input_tokens</code> field represents only the tokens that come <strong class="font-semibold">after the last cache breakpoint</strong> in your request - not all the input tokens you sent.</p><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">To calculate total input tokens:</p><div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm code-block-scroll code-block-wrap"><pre class="block w-full pr-4"><code>total_input_tokens = cache_read_input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens + input_tokens</code></pre></div><div class="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 bg-bg-100 rounded pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-1 transition-opacity duration-200 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100"><button aria-label="Copy code" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 text-text-500" data-cds="Button" data-size="sm" id="base-ui-_R_1r963manpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></span></button></div></div><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Spatial explanation:</strong></p><ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_read_input_tokens</code> = tokens before breakpoint already cached (reads)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_creation_input_tokens</code> = tokens before breakpoint being cached now (writes)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">input_tokens</code> = tokens after your last breakpoint (not eligible for cache)</li>
</ul><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Example:</strong> If you have a request with 100,000 tokens of cached content (read from cache), 0 tokens of new content being cached, and 50 tokens in your user message (after the cache breakpoint):</p><ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_read_input_tokens</code>: 100,000</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_creation_input_tokens</code>: 0</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">input_tokens</code>: 50</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Total input tokens processed</strong>: 100,050 tokens</li>
</ul><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">This is important for understanding both costs and rate limits, as <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">input_tokens</code> will typically be much smaller than your total input when using caching effectively.</p></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="caching-with-thinking-blocks"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Caching with thinking blocks</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">When using <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/extended-thinking">extended thinking</a> with prompt caching, thinking blocks have special behavior:</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Automatic caching alongside other content</strong>: While thinking blocks cannot be explicitly marked with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code>, they get cached as part of the request content when you make subsequent API calls with tool results. This commonly happens during tool use when you pass thinking blocks back to continue the conversation.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Input token counting</strong>: When thinking blocks are read from cache, they count as input tokens in your usage metrics. This is important for cost calculation and token budgeting.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Cache invalidation patterns</strong>:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Cache remains valid when only tool results are provided as user messages</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">On Opus 4.5+ and Sonnet 4.6+, thinking blocks are preserved by default even when non-tool-result user content is added, so the cache remains valid</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">On earlier Opus/Sonnet models and all Haiku models, cache gets invalidated when non-tool-result user content is added, causing all previous thinking blocks to be stripped from context</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">This caching behavior occurs even without explicit <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> markers</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For more details on cache invalidation, see <a class="inline-link" href="#what-invalidates-the-cache">What invalidates the cache</a>.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Example with tool use</strong>:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm code-block-scroll code-block-wrap"><div class="block w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span>Request 1: User: "What's the weather in Paris?"</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Response: [thinking_block_1] + [tool_use block 1]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Request 2:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>User: ["What's the weather in Paris?"],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Assistant: [thinking_block_1] + [tool_use block 1],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>User: [tool_result_1, cache=True]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Response: [thinking_block_2] + [text block 2]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span># Request 2 caches its request content (not the response)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span># The cache includes: user message, thinking_block_1, tool_use block 1, and tool_result_1</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Request 3:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>User: ["What's the weather in Paris?"],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Assistant: [thinking_block_1] + [tool_use block 1],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>User: [tool_result_1, cache=True],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Assistant: [thinking_block_2] + [text block 2],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>User: [Text response, cache=True]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span># On earlier Opus/Sonnet and all Haiku models, <span class="nowrap">non-tool-result</span> user block causes prior thinking blocks to be stripped; on Opus 4.5+/Sonnet 4.6+ they are kept</span></span></code></pre></div></div><div class="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 bg-bg-100 rounded pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-1 transition-opacity duration-200 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100"><button aria-label="Copy code" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 text-text-500" data-cds="Button" data-size="sm" id="base-ui-_R_tmlmanpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></span></button></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">On earlier Opus/Sonnet models and all Haiku models, all previous thinking blocks are removed from context at this point. On Opus 4.5+ and Sonnet 4.6+, prior thinking blocks are kept by default and remain part of the cached prefix.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For more detailed information, see the <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/extended-thinking#understanding-thinking-block-caching-behavior">extended thinking documentation</a>.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="cache-storage-and-sharing"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Cache storage and sharing</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-warning-200 bg-warning-900 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-warning-200"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-warning-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-warning-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-warning-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-warning-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-warning-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">As of February 5, 2026, prompt caching uses <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/manage-claude/workspaces">workspace</a>-level isolation instead of organization-level isolation. Caches are isolated per workspace, ensuring data separation between workspaces within the same organization. This applies to the Claude API, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry (beta); Bedrock and Vertex AI maintain organization-level cache isolation. If you use multiple workspaces, review your caching strategy to account for this difference.</p></div></div>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Organization and workspace isolation:</strong> Caches are isolated between organizations. Different organizations never share caches, even if they use identical prompts. As of February 5, 2026, caches are also isolated per workspace within an organization on the Claude API, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry (beta); Bedrock and Vertex AI continue to use organization-level isolation only.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Exact matching:</strong> Cache hits require 100% identical prompt segments, including all text and images up to and including the block marked with cache control.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Output token generation:</strong> Prompt caching has no effect on output token generation. The response you receive is identical to what you would get if prompt caching were not used.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="best-practices-for-effective-caching"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Best practices for effective caching</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">To optimize prompt caching performance:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Start with <a class="inline-link" href="#automatic-caching">automatic caching</a> for multi-turn conversations. It handles breakpoint management automatically.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Use <a class="inline-link" href="#explicit-cache-breakpoints">explicit block-level breakpoints</a> when you need to cache different sections with different change frequencies.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Cache stable, reusable content like system instructions, background information, large contexts, or frequent tool definitions.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Place cached content at the prompt's beginning for best performance.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Use cache breakpoints strategically to separate different cacheable prefix sections.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Place the breakpoint on the last block that stays identical across requests. For a prompt with a static prefix and a varying suffix (timestamps, per-request context, the incoming message), that is the end of the prefix, not the varying block.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Regularly analyze cache hit rates and adjust your strategy as needed.</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="optimizing-for-different-use-cases"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Optimizing for different use cases</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Tailor your prompt caching strategy to your scenario:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Conversational agents: Reduce cost and latency for extended conversations, especially those with long instructions or uploaded documents.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Coding assistants: Improve autocomplete and codebase Q&amp;A by keeping relevant sections or a summarized version of the codebase in the prompt.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Large document processing: Incorporate complete long-form material including images in your prompt without increasing response latency.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Detailed instruction sets: Share extensive lists of instructions, procedures, and examples to fine-tune Claude's responses.  Developers often include an example or two in the prompt, but with prompt caching you can get even better performance by including 20+ diverse examples of high quality answers.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Agentic tool use: Enhance performance for scenarios involving multiple tool calls and iterative code changes, where each step typically requires a new API call.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Talk to books, papers, documentation, podcast transcripts, and other longform content:  Bring any knowledge base alive by embedding the entire document(s) into the prompt, and letting users ask it questions.</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="troubleshooting-common-issues"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Troubleshooting common issues</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If experiencing unexpected behavior:</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-border-200 bg-bg-200 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-text-000"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-text-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-text-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-text-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-text-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-text-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/cache-diagnostics">Cache diagnostics</a> (beta) has the API compare consecutive requests and report exactly where the prompt prefix diverged, which automatically handles many of the steps in this list.</p></div></div>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Ensure cached sections are identical across calls. For explicit breakpoints, verify that <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> markers are in the same locations</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Check that calls are made within the cache lifetime (5 minutes by default)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Verify that <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tool_choice</code> and image usage remain consistent between calls</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Validate that you are caching at least the minimum number of tokens for your model and platform (see <a class="inline-link" href="#cache-limitations">Cache limitations</a>)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Confirm your breakpoint is on a block that stays identical across requests. Cache writes happen only at the breakpoint, and if that block changes (timestamps, per-request context, the incoming message), the prefix hash never matches. The lookback does not find stable content behind the breakpoint; it only finds entries that earlier requests wrote at their own breakpoints</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Verify that the keys in your <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tool_use</code> content blocks have stable ordering as some languages (for example, Swift, Go) randomize key order during JSON conversion, breaking caches</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Use <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/cache-diagnostics">cache diagnostics</a> to have the API compare consecutive requests and report which part of the prompt diverged</li>
</ul>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Changes to <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tool_choice</code> or the presence/absence of images anywhere in the prompt will invalidate the cache, requiring a new cache entry to be created. For more details on cache invalidation, see <a class="inline-link" href="#what-invalidates-the-cache">What invalidates the cache</a>.</p></div></div>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="1-hour-cache-duration"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>1-hour cache duration</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you find that 5 minutes is too short, Anthropic also offers a 1-hour cache duration <a class="inline-link" href="#pricing">at additional cost</a>.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The 1-hour cache duration is available on the Claude API, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-platform-on-aws">Claude Platform on AWS</a>, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-amazon-bedrock">Amazon Bedrock</a>, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-on-amazon-bedrock-legacy">Amazon Bedrock (legacy)</a>, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-on-vertex-ai">Vertex AI</a>, and <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-microsoft-foundry">Microsoft Foundry</a> (beta).</p></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">To use the extended cache, include <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">ttl</code> in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> definition like this:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm code-block-scroll overflow-x-auto" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"cache_control"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"ephemeral"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "ttl"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"1h"</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">}</span></span></code></pre></div></div><div class="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 bg-bg-100 rounded pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-1 transition-opacity duration-200 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100"><button aria-label="Copy code" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 text-text-500" data-cds="Button" data-size="sm" id="base-ui-_R_to1manpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></span></button></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The response will include detailed cache information like the following:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Output</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button aria-label="Copy code" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 text-text-500" data-cds="Button" data-size="xs" id="base-ui-_R_74o5manpfdabupfdj2mdb_" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:16px;font-weight:533.3'></span></span></button></div></div><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm code-block-scroll overflow-x-auto" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">{</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  "usage"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    "input_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">2048</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    "cache_read_input_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">1800</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    "cache_creation_input_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">248</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    "output_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">503</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    "cache_creation"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      "ephemeral_5m_input_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">148</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      "ephemeral_1h_input_tokens"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">100</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">  }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">}</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Note that the current <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_creation_input_tokens</code> field equals the sum of the values in the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_creation</code> object.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="when-to-use-the-1-hour-cache"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>When to use the 1-hour cache</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you have prompts that are used at a regular cadence (that is, system prompts that are used more frequently than every 5 minutes), continue to use the 5-minute cache, since this will continue to be refreshed at no additional charge.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The 1-hour cache is best used in the following scenarios:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">When you have prompts that are likely used less frequently than 5 minutes, but more frequently than every hour. For example, when an agentic side-agent will take longer than 5 minutes, or when storing a long chat conversation with a user and you generally expect that user may not respond in the next 5 minutes.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">When latency is important and your follow up prompts may be sent beyond 5 minutes.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">When you want to improve your rate limit utilization, since cache hits are not deducted against your rate limit.</li>
</ul>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The 5-minute and 1-hour cache behave the same with respect to latency. You will generally see improved time-to-first-token for long documents.</p></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="mixing-different-ttls"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Mixing different TTLs</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">You can use both 1-hour and 5-minute cache controls in the same request, but with an important constraint: Cache entries with longer TTL must appear before shorter TTLs (that is, a 1-hour cache entry must appear before any 5-minute cache entries).</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">When mixing TTLs, the API determines three billing locations in your prompt:</p>
<ol class="list-none pl-8 [counter-reset:item] [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:[counter-reset:item] mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Position <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">A</code>: The token count at the highest cache hit (or 0 if no hits).</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Position <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">B</code>: The token count at the highest 1-hour <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> block after <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">A</code> (or equals <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">A</code> if none exist).</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Position <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">C</code>: The token count at the last <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> block.</li>
</ol>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">B</code> and/or <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">C</code> are larger than <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">A</code>, they will necessarily be cache misses, because <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">A</code> is the highest cache hit.</p></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">You'll be charged for:</p>
<ol class="list-none pl-8 [counter-reset:item] [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:[counter-reset:item] mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Cache read tokens for <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">A</code>.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">1-hour cache write tokens for <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">(B - A)</code>.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">5-minute cache write tokens for <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">(C - B)</code>.</li>
</ol>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Here are 3 examples. This depicts the input tokens of 3 requests, each of which has different cache hits and cache misses. Each has a different calculated pricing, shown in the colored boxes, as a result.
<img alt="Mixing TTLs Diagram" class="my-6" src="/docs/images/prompt-cache-mixed-ttl.svg"/></p>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="pre-warming-the-cache"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Pre-warming the cache</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Cache pre-warming lets you load your system prompt or tool definitions into the prompt cache before a user triggers a real request. This eliminates the cache-miss latency penalty on the first user interaction, reducing time-to-first-token (TTFT) for latency-sensitive applications.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="how-it-works"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>How it works</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Set <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens: 0</code> in your request. The API reads your prompt into the model and writes the cache at any <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> breakpoint, then returns immediately without generating any output. The response has an empty <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">content</code> array, <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">stop_reason: "max_tokens"</code>, and a fully populated <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">usage</code> block.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Place the <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">cache_control</code> breakpoint on the last block that is shared with the follow-up request (typically your system prompt or tool definitions), not on the placeholder user message. Otherwise the cache entry is keyed to the placeholder and the follow-up request won't hit it. This means using an <a class="inline-link" href="#explicit-cache-breakpoints">explicit cache breakpoint</a> rather than <a class="inline-link" href="#automatic-caching">automatic caching</a>, since automatic caching places the breakpoint on the last block, which here is the placeholder. The placeholder user message can be any string with non-whitespace content (the examples here use <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">"warmup"</code>); its content is read into the model but never answered.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_pre_code]:text-inherit [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10 [&amp;_pre_code]:bg-transparent"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">A pre-warm request incurs a <strong class="font-semibold">cache write</strong> charge if the prefix is not already cached, the same as any other request. Check <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">usage.cache_creation_input_tokens</code> in the response to confirm a write occurred. Zero output tokens are billed.</p></div></div>
<div class="not-prose rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-border-300 border-0.5 my-6"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="flex gap-0.5 overflow-x-auto u-hidden-scrollbar py-1 -my-1"><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">cURL</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">CLI</button><button aria-current="true" font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">TypeScript</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">C#</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">Go</button><button class="text-xs py-1 text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">PHP</button><button class="text-xs py-1 px-2.5 rounded-md whitespace-nowrap font-ui transition-colors text-text-500 hover:text-text-200">Ruby</button></div><div group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish"></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1"><span aria-hidden="true" data-cds="Icon"
