0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:16px;font-weight:533.3'></span></span></button></div></div><div class="py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm h-full overflow-x-auto" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">client </span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> anthropic.Anthropic()</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Fire this before users arrive to warm the shared system-prompt cache.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">prewarm </span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> client.messages.create(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    model</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"claude-opus-4-8"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    max_tokens</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">0</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    system</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">[</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">            "type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"text"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">            "text"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"You are an expert software engineer with deep knowledge of distributed systems..."</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">            "cache_control"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: {</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"type"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"ephemeral"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">},</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    messages</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">[{</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"role"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"user"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">, </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"content"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"warmup"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">}],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">print</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">(prewarm.stop_reason)  </span><span style="--shiki-light:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># "max_tokens"</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">print</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">(prewarm.content)  </span><span style="--shiki-light:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># []</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">print</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">(prewarm.usage)</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The API returns an empty <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">content</code> array:</p>

<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Fire a pre-warm request when your application starts (or on a scheduled interval), then send real user requests after the pre-warm completes:</p>

<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">        max_tokens</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">1024</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">        system</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">SYSTEM_PROMPT</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">        messages</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">[{</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"role"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"user"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">, </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"content"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: user_message}],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">    )</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Warm the cache before any user traffic arrives.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">prewarm_cache()</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Later, when the user submits a message, the system-prompt prefix is already cached.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">response </span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> respond(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"How do I implement a binary search tree?"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">print</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">(response.content[</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">0</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">].text)</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Keep in mind that the cache TTL still applies. For the default 5-minute cache, send a new pre-warm request at least every 5 minutes to keep the cache warm. For longer gaps between user requests, use the <a class="inline-link" href="#1-hour-cache-duration">1-hour cache duration</a> instead.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="limitations"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Limitations</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">A <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens: 0</code> request is rejected with an <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">invalid_request_error</code> if any of the following are set, since each implies output that a zero-token budget cannot produce:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">stream: true</code></li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/extended-thinking">Extended thinking</a> (<code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">thinking.type: "enabled"</code>)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/structured-outputs">Structured outputs</a> (<code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">output_config.format</code>)</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-['•'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">tool_choice</code> of <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">{"type": "tool", ...}</code> or <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">{"type": "any"}</code></li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens: 0</code> is also rejected inside a <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/batch-processing">Message Batches</a> request. Pre-warming targets time-to-first-token, which does not apply to batch processing, and a cache entry written during batch processing would likely expire before the follow-up request runs.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="replacing-the-max-tokens-1-workaround"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Replacing the max_tokens=1 workaround</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Before <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens: 0</code> was available, some applications used <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens: 1</code> warm-up calls to achieve the same effect. The <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens: 0</code> approach is preferred: no output is produced, so there is no single-token reply to discard, no output tokens are billed, and the intent of the request is unambiguous.</p>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>
<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="prompt-caching-examples"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Prompt caching examples</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">To help you get started with prompt caching, the <a class="inline-link" href="https://platform.claude.com/cookbook/misc-prompt-caching" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">prompt caching cookbook</a> provides detailed examples and best practices.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The following code snippets showcase various prompt caching patterns. These examples demonstrate how to implement caching in different scenarios, helping you understand the practical applications of this feature:</p>

<h2 class="font-heading text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="data-retention"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center relative isolate shrink-0 can-focus select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:shadow-none disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent transition font-base duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" data-state="closed" title="Copy link to clipboard" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true" class="inline" data-cds="Icon" style='font-family:var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable);font-feature-settings:"liga" 0;font-optical-sizing:auto;font-style:normal;font-variation-settings:normal;line-height:1;width:1em;height:1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;user-select:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:433.3'></span></button></div><div>Data retention</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Prompt caching (both automatic and explicit) is ZDR eligible. Anthropic does not store the raw text of your prompts or Claude's responses.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">KV (key-value) cache representations and cryptographic hashes of cached content are held in memory only and are not stored at rest. Cached entries have a minimum lifetime of 5 minutes (standard) or 1 hour (extended), after which they are promptly, though not immediately, deleted. Cache entries are isolated between organizations and, on the Claude API, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry (beta), between workspaces within an organization.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For ZDR eligibility across all features, see <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/manage-claude/api-and-data-retention">API and data retention</a>.</p>
<hr class="mt-12 mb-8 border-0 bg-border-400 opacity-80 rounded h-px"/>

The system does not write entries for any earlier position. Because the hash is cumulative, covering everything up to and including the breakpoint, changing any block at or before the breakpoint produces a different hash on the next request.\"]}]}],\"\\n\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",null,{\"className\":\"mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul\u003e\u0026]:before:content-['•'] [ol\u003e\u0026]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol\u003e\u0026]:[counter-increment:item]\",\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"$L1f\",null,{\"contentType\":\"paragraph\",\"minLength\":20,\"className\":\"mb-2 last:mb-0\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"p\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"strong\",null,{\"className\":\"font-semibold\",\"children\":\"Cache reads look backward for entries that prior requests wrote.\"}],\" On each request the system computes the prefix hash at your breakpoint and checks for a matching cache entry. If none exists, it walks backward one block at a time, checking whether the prefix hash at each earlier position matches something already in the cache. It is looking for prior writes, not for stable content.\"]}]}],\"\\n\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",null,{\"className\":\"mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul\u003e\u0026]:before:content-['•'] [ol\u003e\u0026]:before:content-[counter(item)'.'] [ol\u003e\u0026]:[counter-increment:item]\",\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"$L1f\",null,{\"contentType\":\"paragraph\",\"minLength\":20,\"className\":\"mb-2 last:mb-0\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"p\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"strong\",null,{\"className\":\"font-semibold\",\"children\":\"The lookback window is 20 blocks.\"}],\" The system checks at most 20 positions per breakpoint, counting the breakpoint itself as the first. nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"client = anthropic.Anthropic()\n\nSYSTEM_PROMPT = [\n    {\n        \"type\": \"text\",\n        \"text\": \"You are an expert software engineer with deep knowledge of distributed systems...\",\n        \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"},\n    }\n]\n\n\ndef prewarm_cache() -\u003e None:\n    \"\"\"Call this at application startup or on a scheduled interval.\"\"\"\n    client.messages.create(\n        model=\"claude-opus-4-8\",\n        max_tokens=0,\n        system=SYSTEM_PROMPT,\n        messages=[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"warmup\"}],\n    )\n\n\ndef respond(user_message: str) -\u003e anthropic.types.Message:\n    \"\"\"The real user request; benefits from a warm cache.\"\"\"\n    return client.messages.create(\n        model=\"claude-opus-4-8\",\n        max_tokens=1024,\n        system=SYSTEM_PROMPT,\n        messages=[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": user_message}],\n    )\n\n\n# Warm the cache before any user traffic arrives.\nprewarm_cache()\n\n# Later, when the user submits a message, the system-prompt prefix is already cached.\nresponse = respond(\"How do I implement a binary search tree?\")\nprint(response.content[0].text)"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"10f:T2136,"])</script><script \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"Hello, can you tell me more about the solar system?\"\n                }\n            ]\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"assistant\",\n            \"content\": \"Certainly! The solar system is the collection of celestial bodies that orbit our Sun. It consists of eight planets, numerous moons, asteroids, comets, and other objects. The planets, in order from closest to farthest from the Sun, are: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Each planet has its own unique characteristics and features. Is there a specific aspect of the solar system you would like to know more about?\"\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"curl https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages \\\n     --header \"x-api-key: $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\" \\\n     --header \"anthropic-version: 2023-06-01\" \\\n     --header \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n     --data \\\n'{\n    \"model\": \"claude-opus-4-8\",\n    \"max_tokens\": 1024,\n    \"tools\": [\n        {\n            \"name\": \"search_documents\",\n            \"description\": \"Search through the knowledge base\",\n            \"input_schema\": {\n                \"type\": \"object\",\n                \"properties\": {\n                    \"query\": {\n                        \"type\": \"string\",\n                        \"description\": \"Search query\"\n                    }\n                },\n                \"required\": [\"query\"]\n            }\n        },\n        {\n            \"name\": \"get_document\",\n            \"description\": \"Retrieve a specific document by ID\",\n            \"input_schema\": {\n                \"type\": \"object\",\n                \"properties\": {\n                    \"doc_id\": {\n                        \"type\": \"string\",\n                        \"description\": \"Document ID\"\n                    }\n                },\n                \"required\": [\"doc_id\"]\n            },\n            \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"}\n        }\n    ],\n    \"system\": [\n        {\n            \"type\": \"text\",\n            \"text\": \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\",\n            \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"}\n        },\n        {\n            \"type\": \"text\",\n            \"text\": \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\",\n            \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"}\n        }\n    ],\n    \"messages\": [\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": \"Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\"\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"assistant\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"tool_use\",\n                    \"id\": \"tool_1\",\n                    \"name\": \"search_documents\",\n                    \"input\": {\"query\": \"Mars rovers\"}\n                }\n            ]\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"tool_result\",\n                    \"tool_use_id\": \"tool_1\",\n                    \"content\": \"Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration), Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\"\n                }\n            ]\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"assistant\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\"\n                }\n            ]\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\",\n                    \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"}\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n    ]\n}'"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"15e:T347f,"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"const client = new Anthropic();\n\nconst response = await client.messages.create({\n  model: \"claude-opus-4-8\",\n  max_tokens: 1024,\n  system: [\n    {\n      type: \"text\",\n      text: \"...long system prompt\",\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    }\n  ],\n  messages: [\n    // ...long conversation so far\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Hello, can you tell me more about the solar system?\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      content:\n        \"Certainly! The solar system is the collection of celestial bodies that orbit our Sun. It consists of eight planets, numerous moons, asteroids, comets, and other objects. The planets, in order from closest to farthest from the Sun, are: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Each planet has its own unique characteristics and features. Is there a specific aspect of the solar system you'd like to know more about?\"\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Good to know.\"\n        },\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Tell me more about Mars.\",\n          cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n});\nconsole.log(response);"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"17f:T2313,"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"import com.anthropic.models.messages.CacheControlEphemeral;\n// ...\n    AnthropicClient client = AnthropicOkHttpClient.fromEnv();\n\n    // Create ephemeral system prompt\n    TextBlockParam systemPrompt = TextBlockParam.builder()\n      .text(\"...long system prompt\")\n      .cacheControl(CacheControlEphemeral.builder().build())\n      .build();\n\n    // Create message params\n    MessageCreateParams params = MessageCreateParams.builder()\n      .model(Model.CLAUDE_OPUS_4_8)\n      .maxTokens(1024)\n      .systemOfTextBlockParams(List.of(systemPrompt))\n      // First user message (without cache control)\n      .addUserMessage(\"Hello, can you tell me more about the solar system?\")\n      // Assistant response\n      .addAssistantMessage(\n        \"Certainly! The solar system is the collection of celestial bodies that orbit our Sun. It consists of eight planets, numerous moons, asteroids, comets, and other objects. The planets, in order from closest to farthest from the Sun, are: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Each planet has its own unique characteristics and features. Is there a specific aspect of the solar system you would like to know more about?\"\n      )\n      // Second user message (with cache control)\n      .addUserMessageOfBlockParams(\n        List.of(\n          ContentBlockParam.ofText(TextBlockParam.builder().text(\"Good to know.\").build()),\n          ContentBlockParam.ofText(\n            TextBlockParam.builder()\n              .text(\"Tell me more about Mars.\")\n              .cacheControl(CacheControlEphemeral.builder().build())\n              .build()\n          )\n        )\n      )\n      .build();\n\n    Message message = client.messages().create(params);\n    System.out.println(message);"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"185:T2ef4,"])</script><script The solar system is the collection of celestial bodies that orbit our Sun. It consists of eight planets, numerous moons, asteroids, comets, and other objects. The planets, in order from closest to farthest from the Sun, are: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Each planet has its own unique characteristics and features. Is there a specific aspect of the solar system you would like to know more about?\"\n        ],\n        [\n            'role' =\u003e 'user',\n            'content' =\u003e [\n                ['type' =\u003e 'text', 'text' =\u003e 'Good to know.'],\n                [\n                    'type' =\u003e 'text',\n                    'text' =\u003e 'Tell me more about Mars.',\n nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"client = Anthropic::Client.new\n\nmessage = client.messages.create(\n  model: \"claude-opus-4-8\",\n  max_tokens: 1024,\n  system: [\n    {\n      type: \"text\",\n      text: \"...long system prompt\",\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    }\n  ],\n  messages: [\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Hello, can you tell me more about the solar system?\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      content: \"Certainly! The solar system is the collection of celestial bodies that orbit our Sun. It consists of eight planets, numerous moons, asteroids, comets, and other objects. The planets, in order from closest to farthest from the Sun, are: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Each planet has its own unique characteristics and features. Is there a specific aspect of the solar system you would like to know more about?\"\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        { type: \"text\", text: \"Good to know.\" },\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Tell me more about Mars.\",\n          cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n)\nputs message"])</script><script This is to ensure that if this gets evicted from the cache (after not being used for more than 5 minutes), it will get added back to the cache on the next nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"18a:T999,"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"ant messages create \u003c\u003c'YAML'\nmodel: claude-opus-4-8\nmax_tokens: 1024\ntools:\n  - name: search_documents\n    description: Search through the knowledge base\n    input_schema:\n      type: object\n      properties:\n        query:\n          type: string\n          description: Search query\n      required: [query]\n  - name: get_document\n    description: Retrieve a specific document by ID\n    input_schema:\n      type: object\n      properties:\n        doc_id:\n          type: string\n          description: Document ID\n      required: [doc_id]\n    cache_control:\n      type: ephemeral\nsystem:\n  - type: text\n    text: |-\n      You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\n\n      # Instructions\n      - Always search for relevant documents before answering\n      - Provide citations for your sources\n      - Be objective and accurate in your responses\n      - If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\n      - Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\n    cache_control:\n      type: ephemeral\n  - type: text\n    text: |-\n      # Knowledge Base Context\n\n      Here are the relevant documents for this conversation:\n\n      ## Document 1: Solar System Overview\n      The solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\n\n      ## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\n      Each planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\n\n      ## Document 3: Mars Exploration\n      Mars has been a target of exploration for decades...\n\n      [Additional documents...]\n    cache_control:\n      type: ephemeral\nmessages:\n  - role: user\n    content: Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\n  - role: assistant\n    content:\n      - type: tool_use\n        id: tool_1\n        name: search_documents\n        input:\n          query: Mars rovers\n  - role: user\n    content:\n      - type: tool_result\n        tool_use_id: tool_1\n        content: \u003e-\n          Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration),\n          Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\n  - role: assistant\n    content:\n      - type: text\n        text: \u003e-\n          I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more\n          details from the Mars Exploration document.\n  - role: user\n    content:\n      - type: text\n        text: Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\n        cache_control:\n          type: ephemeral\nYAML"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"18b:T27c3,"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cpre class=\"shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus\" style=\"--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA\"\u003eant\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178\"\u003e messages\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178\"\u003e create\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6\"\u003e \u0026#x3C;\u0026#x3C;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6\"\u003e'YAML'\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178\"\u003emodel: claude-opus-4-8\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178\"\u003emax_tokens: 1024\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178\"\u003etools:\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178\"\u003e  - nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"client = anthropic.Anthropic()\n\nresponse = client.messages.create(\n    model=\"claude-opus-4-8\",\n    max_tokens=1024,\n    tools=[\n },\n        {\n            \"name\": \"get_document\",\n            \"description\": \"Retrieve a specific document by ID\",\n            \"input_schema\": {\n                \"type\": \"object\",\n                \"properties\": {\n                    \"doc_id\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"description\": \"Document ID\"}\n                },\n                \"required\": [\"doc_id\"],\n            },\n            \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"},\n        },\n    ],\n    system=[\n        {\n            \"type\": \"text\",\n            \"text\": \"You are a helpful research Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\",\n                }\n            ],\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\",\n                    \"cache_control\": {\"type\": \"ephemeral\"},\n                }\n            ],\n        },\n    ],\n)\nprint(response.model_dump_json())"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"const client = new Anthropic();\n\nconst response = await client.messages.create({\n  model: \"claude-opus-4-8\",\n  max_tokens: 1024,\n  tools: [\n    {\n      name: \"search_documents\",\n      description: \"Search through the knowledge base\",\n      input_schema: {\n        type: \"object\",\n        properties: {\n          query: {\n            type: \"string\",\n            description: \"Search query\"\n          }\n        },\n        required: [\"query\"]\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      name: \"get_document\",\n      description: \"Retrieve a specific document by ID\",\n      input_schema: {\n        type: \"object\",\n        properties: {\n          doc_id: {\n            type: \"string\",\n            description: \"Document ID\"\n          }\n        },\n        required: [\"doc_id\"]\n      },\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    }\n  ],\n  system: [\n    {\n      type: \"text\",\n      text: \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\",\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    },\n    {\n      type: \"text\",\n      text: \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\",\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    }\n  ],\n  messages: [\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: \"Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\"\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"tool_use\",\n          id: \"tool_1\",\n          name: \"search_documents\",\n          input: { query: \"Mars rovers\" }\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"tool_result\",\n          tool_use_id: \"tool_1\",\n          content:\n            \"Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration), Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\",\n          cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n});\nconsole.log(response);"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"AnthropicClient client = new()\n{\n    ApiKey = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\")\n};\n\nvar parameters = new MessageCreateParams\n{\n    Model = Model.ClaudeOpus4_8,\n    MaxTokens = 1024,\n    Tools =\n    [\n        new ToolUnion(new Tool()\n        {\n            Name = \"search_documents\",\n            Description = \"Search through the knowledge base\",\n            InputSchema = new InputSchema()\n            {\n                Properties = new Dictionary\u003cstring, JsonElement\u003e\n                {\n                    [\"query\"] = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(new { type = \"string\", description = \"Search query\" }),\n                },\n                Required = [\"query\"],\n            },\n        }),\n        new ToolUnion(new Tool()\n        {\n            Name = \"get_document\",\n            Description = \"Retrieve a specific document by ID\",\n            InputSchema = new InputSchema()\n            {\n                Properties = new Dictionary\u003cstring, JsonElement\u003e\n                {\n                    [\"doc_id\"] = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(new { type = \"string\", description = \"Document ID\" }),\n                },\n                Required = [\"doc_id\"],\n            },\n            CacheControl = new CacheControlEphemeral(),\n        }),\n    ],\n    System = new MessageCreateParamsSystem(new List\u003cTextBlockParam\u003e\n    {\n        new TextBlockParam()\n        {\n            Text = \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\",\n            CacheControl = new CacheControlEphemeral(),\n        },\n        new TextBlockParam()\n        {\n            Text = \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\",\n            CacheControl = new CacheControlEphemeral(),\n        },\n    }),\n    Messages =\n    [\n        new() { Role = Role.User, Content = \"Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\" },\n        new()\n        {\n            Role = Role.Assistant,\n            Content = new MessageParamContent(new List\u003cContentBlockParam\u003e\n            {\n                new ContentBlockParam(new ToolUseBlockParam()\n                {\n                    ID = \"tool_1\",\n                    Name = \"search_documents\",\n                    Input = new Dictionary\u003cstring, JsonElement\u003e\n                    {\n                        [\"query\"] = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(\"Mars rovers\"),\n                    },\n                }),\n            }),\n        },\n        new()\n        {\n            Role = Role.User,\n            Content = new MessageParamContent(new List\u003cContentBlockParam\u003e\n            {\n                new ContentBlockParam(new ToolResultBlockParam()\n                {\n                    ToolUseID = \"tool_1\",\n                    Content = \"Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration), Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\",\n                }),\n            }),\n        },\n        new()\n        {\n            Role = Role.Assistant,\n            Content = \"I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\",\n        },\n        new()\n        {\n            Role = Role.User,\n            Content = new MessageParamContent(new List\u003cContentBlockParam\u003e\n            {\n                new ContentBlockParam(new TextBlockParam()\n                {\n                    Text = \"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\",\n                    CacheControl = new CacheControlEphemeral(),\n                }),\n            }),\n        },\n    ]\n};\n\nvar message = await client.Messages.Create(parameters);\nConsole.WriteLine(message);"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"191:T81f5,"])</script><script anthropic.ModelClaudeOpus4_8,\n\tMaxTokens: 1024,\n\tTools: []anthropic.ToolUnionParam{\n\t\t{OfTool: \u0026anthropic.ToolParam{\n\t\t\tName:        \"search_documents\",\n\t\t\tDescription: anthropic.String(\"Search through the knowledge base\"),\n\t\t\tInputSchema: anthropic.ToolInputSchemaParam{\n\t\t\t\tProperties: map[string]any{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"query\": map[string]any{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"type\":        \"string\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"description\": \"Search query\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tRequired: []string{\"query\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}},\n\t\t{OfTool: \u0026anthropic.ToolParam{\n\t\t\tName:        \"get_document\",\n\t\t\tDescription: anthropic.String(\"Retrieve a specific document by ID\"),\n\t\t\tInputSchema: anthropic.ToolInputSchemaParam{\n\t\t\t\tProperties: map[string]any{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"doc_id\": map[string]any{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"type\":        \"string\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"description\": \"Document ID\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tRequired: []string{\"doc_id\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tCacheControl: anthropic.NewCacheControlEphemeralParam(),\n\t\t}},\n\t},\n\tSystem: []anthropic.TextBlockParam{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tText:         \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\",\n\t\t\tCacheControl: anthropic.NewCacheControlEphemeralParam(),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tText:         \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\",\n\t\t\tCacheControl: anthropic.NewCacheControlEphemeralParam(),\n\t\t},\n\t},\n\tMessages: []anthropic.MessageParam{\n\t\tanthropic.NewUserMessage(anthropic.NewTextBlock(\"Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\")),\n\t\tanthropic.NewAssistantMessage(anthropic.NewToolUseBlock(\n\t\t\t\"tool_1\",\n\t\t\tmap[string]any{\"query\": \"Mars rovers\"},\n\t\t\t\"search_documents\",\n\t\t)),\n\t\tanthropic.NewUserMessage(anthropic.NewToolResultBlock(\n\t\t\t\"tool_1\",\n\t\t\t\"Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration), Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\",\n\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t)),\n\t\tanthropic.NewAssistantMessage(anthropic.NewTextBlock(\"I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\")),\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tRole: anthropic.MessageParamRoleUser,\n\t\t\tContent: []anthropic.ContentBlockParamUnion{\n\t\t\t\t{OfText: \u0026anthropic.TextBlockParam{\n\t\t\t\t\tText:         \"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\",\n\t\t\t\t\tCacheControl: anthropic.NewCacheControlEphemeralParam(),\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t},\n})\nif err != nil {\n\tlog.Fatal(err)\n}\nfmt.Println(response)"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"import com.anthropic.models.messages.CacheControlEphemeral;\n// ...\n    AnthropicClient client = AnthropicOkHttpClient.fromEnv();\n\n    // Search tool schema\n    InputSchema searchSchema = InputSchema.builder()\n      .properties(\n        JsonValue.from(\n          Map.of(\"query\", Map.of(\"type\", \"string\", \"description\", \"Search query\"))\n        )\n      )\n      .putAdditionalProperty(\"required\", JsonValue.from(List.of(\"query\")))\n      .build();\n\n    // Get document tool schema\n    InputSchema getDocSchema = InputSchema.builder()\n      .properties(\n        JsonValue.from(\n          Map.of(\"doc_id\", Map.of(\"type\", \"string\", \"description\", \"Document ID\"))\n        )\n      )\n      .putAdditionalProperty(\"required\", JsonValue.from(List.of(\"doc_id\")))\n      .build();\n\n    MessageCreateParams params = MessageCreateParams.builder()\n      .model(Model.CLAUDE_OPUS_4_8)\n      .maxTokens(1024)\n      // Tools with cache control on the last one\n      .addTool(\n        Tool.builder()\n          .name(\"search_documents\")\n          .description(\"Search through the knowledge base\")\n          .inputSchema(searchSchema)\n          .build()\n      )\n      .addTool(\n        Tool.builder()\n          .name(\"get_document\")\n          .description(\"Retrieve a specific document by ID\")\n          .inputSchema(getDocSchema)\n          .cacheControl(CacheControlEphemeral.builder().build())\n          .build()\n      )\n      // System prompts with cache control on instructions and context separately\n      .systemOfTextBlockParams(\n        List.of(\n          TextBlockParam.builder()\n            .text(\n              \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\"\n            )\n            .cacheControl(CacheControlEphemeral.builder().build())\n            .build(),\n          TextBlockParam.builder()\n            .text(\n              \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\"\n            )\n            .cacheControl(CacheControlEphemeral.builder().build())\n            .build()\n        )\n      )\n      // Conversation history\n      .addUserMessage(\"Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\")\n      .addAssistantMessageOfBlockParams(\n        List.of(\n          ContentBlockParam.ofToolUse(\n            ToolUseBlockParam.builder()\n              .id(\"tool_1\")\n              .name(\"search_documents\")\n              .input(JsonValue.from(Map.of(\"query\", \"Mars rovers\")))\n              .build()\n          )\n        )\n      )\n      .addUserMessageOfBlockParams(\n        List.of(\n          ContentBlockParam.ofToolResult(\n            ToolResultBlockParam.builder()\n              .toolUseId(\"tool_1\")\n              .content(\n                \"Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration), Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\"\n              )\n              .build()\n          )\n        )\n      )\n      .addAssistantMessageOfBlockParams(\n        List.of(\n          ContentBlockParam.ofText(\n            TextBlockParam.builder()\n              .text(\n                \"I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\"\n              )\n              .build()\n          )\n        )\n      )\n      .addUserMessageOfBlockParams(\n        List.of(\n          ContentBlockParam.ofText(\n            TextBlockParam.builder()\n              .text(\"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\")\n              .cacheControl(CacheControlEphemeral.builder().build())\n              .build()\n          )\n        )\n      )\n      .build();\n\n    Message message = client.messages().create(params);\n    System.out.println(message);"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"195:T89b2,"])</script><script nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cpre Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.'\n                ]\n            ]\n        ],\n        [\n            'role' =\u003e 'user',\n            'content' =\u003e [\n                [\n                    'type' =\u003e 'text',\n                    'text' =\u003e 'Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.',\n                    'cache_control' =\u003e ['type' =\u003e 'ephemeral']\n                ]\n            ]\n        ]\n    ],\n    model: 'claude-opus-4-8',\n    system: [\n        [\n            'type' =\u003e 'text',\n            'text' =\u003e \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\",\n            'cache_control' =\u003e ['type' =\u003e 'ephemeral']\n        ],\n        [\n            'type' =\u003e 'text',\n            'text' =\u003e \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\",\n            'cache_control' =\u003e ['type' =\u003e 'ephemeral']\n        ]\n    ],\n    tools: [\n        [\n            'name' =\u003e 'search_documents',\n            'description' =\u003e 'Search through the knowledge base',\n nonce="GmjuN1iFIVkDFGhQtf8Neg==">self.__next_f.push([1,"client = Anthropic::Client.new\n\nmessage = client.messages.create(\n  model: \"claude-opus-4-8\",\n  max_tokens: 1024,\n  tools: [\n    {\n      name: \"search_documents\",\n      description: \"Search through the knowledge base\",\n      input_schema: {\n        type: \"object\",\n        properties: {\n          query: {\n            type: \"string\",\n            description: \"Search query\"\n          }\n        },\n        required: [\"query\"]\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      name: \"get_document\",\n      description: \"Retrieve a specific document by ID\",\n      input_schema: {\n        type: \"object\",\n        properties: {\n          doc_id: {\n            type: \"string\",\n            description: \"Document ID\"\n          }\n        },\n        required: [\"doc_id\"]\n      },\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    }\n  ],\n  system: [\n    {\n      type: \"text\",\n      text: \"You are a helpful research assistant with access to a document knowledge base.\\n\\n# Instructions\\n- Always search for relevant documents before answering\\n- Provide citations for your sources\\n- Be objective and accurate in your responses\\n- If multiple documents contain relevant information, synthesize them\\n- Acknowledge when information is not available in the knowledge base\",\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    },\n    {\n      type: \"text\",\n      text: \"# Knowledge Base Context\\n\\nHere are the relevant documents for this conversation:\\n\\n## Document 1: Solar System Overview\\nThe solar system consists of the Sun and all objects that orbit it...\\n\\n## Document 2: Planetary Characteristics\\nEach planet has unique features. Mercury is the smallest planet...\\n\\n## Document 3: Mars Exploration\\nMars has been a target of exploration for decades...\\n\\n[Additional documents...]\",\n      cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n    }\n  ],\n  messages: [\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: \"Can you search for information about Mars rovers?\"\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"tool_use\",\n          id: \"tool_1\",\n          name: \"search_documents\",\n          input: { query: \"Mars rovers\" }\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"tool_result\",\n          tool_use_id: \"tool_1\",\n          content: \"Found 3 relevant documents: Document 3 (Mars Exploration), Document 7 (Rover Technology), Document 9 (Mission History)\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"I found 3 relevant documents about Mars rovers. Let me get more details from the Mars Exploration document.\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      role: \"user\",\n      content: [\n        {\n          type: \"text\",\n          text: \"Yes, please tell me about the Perseverance rover specifically.\",\n          cache_control: { type: \"ephemeral\" }\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n)\nputs message"])</script><script
